Home / Services / Pergolas and Patios

Pergolas and Patios

Enhance your outdoor living space with a custom pergola or patio.

Beyond decks, Chandler and Chandler Construction crafts beautiful pergolas and patios to complete your backyard oasis. A custom-designed pergola provides shade and architectural interest, creating a perfect spot for relaxation or entertaining. We use durable materials like cedar or pressure-treated lumber to ensure your pergola stands up to Omaha's weather.

Our patio construction service creates a solid, level surface for outdoor dining, lounging, or grilling. We offer a variety of materials, including pavers, concrete, and natural stone, to match your style and budget. We handle all aspects of the project, from design and excavation to installation and finishing touches. Let us transform your backyard into a stunning outdoor retreat.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Design Consultation - Discuss your vision and preferences for your pergola or patio.
  2. 02 Step 2: Site Preparation - Prepare the site for construction, including excavation and grading.
  3. 03 Step 3: Construction - Build the pergola or patio using high-quality materials and expert craftsmanship.
  4. 04 Step 4: Finishing Touches - Add the finishing touches to complete your outdoor space.

Benefits

  • Create a comfortable and inviting outdoor living space.
  • Add shade and architectural interest to your backyard.
  • Increase your home's value.
  • Enjoy outdoor dining and entertaining.

Frequently Asked Questions

How much does a pergola or patio cost?

The cost of a pergola or patio varies depending on the size, materials, and complexity of the design. We offer free consultations to provide you with a detailed quote.

How long does it take to build a pergola or patio?

The construction process typically takes 1-2 weeks, depending on the size and complexity of the project.

Do I need a permit for a pergola or patio?

Permit requirements vary depending on the size and location of the project. We can help you determine if a permit is required and handle the application process.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with pergolas and patios? Contact us today.
